title: U.S. Election Day
description: National voting day in the 2024 United States presidential election, a major offline milestone for political discussion across the dataset.

title: Donald Trump Inaugurated for a Second Term
description: Trump's January 20, 2025 inauguration triggered a new cycle of discussion about executive power, policy direction, and high-profile figures around the administration.

title: Reagan National Airport Midair Collision
description: A passenger jet and Army helicopter collided near Washington, D.C., producing a major national news shock that fed into federal accountability and safety debates.

title: Nationwide 50501 Anti-Trump Protests
description: The 50501 movement organized coordinated anti-Trump and anti-Musk protests in multiple U.S. cities, aligning with visible activism and backlash themes in the dataset.

title: Munich Security Conference Opens
description: The 2025 Munich Security Conference opened as global attention focused on U.S. foreign policy, Europe, NATO, Russia, and Ukraine-related rhetoric.

title: "No Kings" Presidents Day Protests
description: A second major wave of 50501-linked demonstrations took place on Presidents Day, extending anti-administration protest activity into another clear discussion spike.
